decisions.title: C4 hardening commit chain
decisions.description: Chain: (1) caps for limit/page/queryLimit/responseItems, (2) canonical subject in WS responses, (3) defensive ordering + robust getlast, (4) tests for unordered/empty/caps. One architectural reason per commit, max 2-3 files each.
alternatives: Patch only tests without runtime guards

decisions.title: C4 caps and read-path rules
decisions.description: Constants: maxLimit=1000, maxPage=100, maxQueryLimit=20000, maxResponseItems=1000. Defaults: limit=100, page=1. Rule: reject out-of-cap params with validation problem before store call; WS response subject always canonical subject.String(); read-path sorts defensively by seq asc (deterministic tie-break) before paginate/getlast.
alternatives: Assume store ordering and skip defensive sort

decisions.title: Review: non-breaking and scoped
decisions.description: Hardening keeps payload shape compatible; only adds input validation errors and canonical subject normalization. No storage/migration changes. Pagination determinism preserved with explicit guardrails and later defensive ordering.
alternatives: Broaden to storage contract changes now

decisions.title: C4 hardening commit 1 done
decisions.description: Commit cb83c13 adds caps/defaults in getrange path: maxLimit=1000, maxPage=100, maxQueryLimit=20000, maxResponseItems=1000, default limit=100. Requests beyond caps fail before store call. Gates passed (s): 0,6,0,4,4,7,1,0,6.
